title: Hiring Medical Officer at Symbiosis Hospital

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Symbiosis Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Symbiosis Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Symbiosis Hospital:
Symbiosis Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Symbiosis Hospital!
